message:
perf(codegen): Optimize TestContext processing - skip hoisting and reuse class names

PROBLEM: TestContext class with 13 test methods was taking excessive time to process due to:
1. hoistAllLocalClassesFromMethods() scanning ALL 13 test method bodies for local classes
2. Building class_names_list 13+ times (once per test method) by iterating HashMap

SOLUTION:
1. Skip test_ methods in hoistAllLocalClassesFromMethods() - they NEVER return local classes
2. Build class_names_list ONCE per class and reuse for all test methods
3. Add defer to properly clean up ArrayList

IMPACT: Reduces O(n*m) to O(n) where n=test methods, m=registered classes

Files changed:
- local_class_hoisting.zig: Skip test_ methods (they only make assertions, never return classes)
- generators.zig: Build class_names_list once before test method loop, add defer cleanup
- test_skip.zig: Minor formatting (add braces to for loop)

NOTE: test_raise.py still crashes at TestContext with exit code 132 (SIGILL) - investigating separately
